description_long: This is a three-story office building with a classic brick facade and symmetrical window arrangement. The lower level is clad in a lighter stone or concrete material, while the upper stories feature reddish-brown brickwork. The windows are arched on the top floor and rectangular on the lower floors, all evenly spaced in a grid pattern. The rooftop includes HVAC units, a large billboard advertising 'Creating Cyberpunk,' and utility structures such as pipes and vents. The rear of the building displays two prominent vertical black pipes running from the ground to the roof. The building sits on a concrete base, suggesting an urban sidewalk or street setting.
description: A three-story brick office building with arched windows, a rooftop billboard, and utility structures, set on a concrete base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main facade with arched windows, a central entrance, and a large rooftop billboard.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting two tall black utility pipes, rooftop HVAC units, and no visible entrance.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the building's depth, rooftop equipment, and a partial view of the billboard and pipes.
description_view_3: Opposite facade with symmetrical windows and the billboard visible from the side, but no entrance.
attribute_window_pattern: Regularly spaced, vertically aligned arched and rectangular windows in a grid pattern on each floor.
